name: Pickled Baby Corn on the Cob
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Fresh baby corn on the cob, husked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, stir together sugar, vinegar, turmeric, celery seed, mustard, and minced garlic.
2. Add the corn to the mixture.
3. Bring to a full boil over medium heat.
4. Boil gently for 2 minutes after reaching a boil.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Transfer the corn to a moisture- and vapor-proof container.
7. Pour in enough of the cooking liquid to cover the corn completely.
8. Cover the container and refrigerate for up to 1 week.
